description: An electronic batch record from 10 years ago has passed its required retention period and can be moved from the live system to a long-term archive.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of all batch records eligible for archiving.

expected_outcome.value: Agent obtains a list of records older than the retention period.

nodes.task_description: Select a batch record from the list and initiate the archiving process.

expected_outcome.value: Agent starts the archiving workflow for a specific record.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the record has been successfully moved to the archive and is no longer in the active database.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the record is now in the archive and is no longer searchable in the main system.
